parameters.jsCode:
const s = $('Delete Old Executions').first().json; const workflowRows = s.topWorkflows.map(w => `${w.name}${w.deleted}${w.failed}` ).join(''); const statusRows = Object.entries(s.byStatus).map(([status, counts]) => `${status}${counts.scanned}${counts.deleted}${counts.failed}` ).join(''); const errorSection = s.errors.length > 0 ? `

⚠️ Errors (first 10)

    ${s.errors.slice(0, 10).map(e => '
  • ' + e + '
    • ').join('')}
` : ''; const html = `

🧹 TAS Execution Cleanup Report

Run: ${s.runAt}

Mode: ${s.dryRun ? '🔵 DRY RUN (no deletions)' : '🟢 LIVE'}

Retention: ${s.retentionDays} days (cutoff: ${s.cutoffDate})

MetricCount
Total scanned${s.totalScanned}
🗑️ Deleted${s.totalDeleted}
⏭️ Skipped (within retention)${s.totalSkipped}
❌ Failed${s.totalFailed}

By Status

${statusRows}
StatusScannedDeletedFailed

Top Workflows by Deletions

${workflowRows || ''}
WorkflowDeletedFailed
No deletions this run
${errorSection}

Full audit trail logged to Google Sheet: TAS_N8N_Audit → Execution_Cleanup

`; return [{ json: { html, recipient: s.emailRecipient, subject: `TAS N8N Audit: ${s.totalDeleted} executions cleaned, ${s.totalScanned} scanned` } }];
